description_long: This object consists of a six-pack of Barrilito beer bottles, each made of dark brown glass with blue and gold labels around the neck and body. The bottles are housed in a light blue cardboard carrier with the Barrilito logo prominently displayed in white and gold. The carrier has six compartments, each holding a single bottle upright, with one bottle lying on its side in front of the pack. The bottle caps are metallic and colored blue with gold accents, matching the label design. The glass bottles have a glossy finish, reflecting light, and the cardboard carrier appears sturdy and slightly glossy. The overall appearance is clean, with no visible damage or wear, and the branding is clear and legible.
description: A six-pack of Barrilito beer bottles in a blue cardboard carrier, featuring dark brown glass bottles with blue and gold labels and caps.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the Barrilito logo on the carrier, five upright bottles, and one bottle lying in front.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the tops of the bottles and the back of the carrier, with the lying bottle partially visible.
description_view_2: Direct front view highlighting the Barrilito logo and all six bottle necks protruding from the carrier.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back of the carrier, the bottle caps, and the bottle lying on its side.
attribute_label_or_branding: The carrier and bottle labels display the 'Barrilito' logo in bold white letters with gold accents on a blue background. The carrier also features the word 'Cerveza' and a stylized barrel graphic. The branding is prominent on both the carrier and the bottle necks.
